The following events took place in '''1250 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Belia Darzu]] becomes [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] of the [[New Sith]] Empire.
*The [[Sictis Wars]] begin.
